nodes.name: Black Bean Wrap — Garlic-Ginger Wrap
nodes.description: name: Black Bean Wrap — Garlic-Ginger Wrap | short_description: A hearty plant-based wrap with black beans, avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a side
nodes.premise: Meal: Black Bean Wrap — Garlic-Ginger Wrap - name: Black Bean Wrap — Garlic-Ginger Wrap | short_description: A hearty plant-based wrap with black beans, avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a side of fruit and, if desired, dairy-free yogurt for extra protein. For lower sodium, use low-sodium salsa and adjust wrap/bean portions; to boost protein, add an extra handful of beans or a small serving of quinoa on the side. | nutrition_note: Plant-based protein and fiber from black beans; healthy fats from avocado; plus complex carbs from whole-wheat wrap. Provides vitamins A/C and potassium from lettuce and salsa. Watch sodium from salsa; choose low-sodium or control portion. Garlic and ginger can be added for flavor and potential anti-inflammatory benefits.

nodes.premise: Meal: Tuna Pasta Salad — Garlic-Ginger Plate - name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Garlic-Ginger Plate | short_description: Tuna pasta salad with cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and olive oil. | meal_suggestion: Serve chilled as a light main. For more fiber and flavor, swap to whole-grain pasta and add lemon juice and fresh herbs; optional garlic or ginger can be added if desired. | nutrition_note: Protein from tuna and carbs from pasta provide satiety; olive oil adds healthy fats; cucumber and cherry tomatoes boost fiber and micronutrients. Note: canned tuna can be high in sodium; consider rinsing or choosing low-sodium options. The name mentions garlic/ginger, but they are not in the listed ingredients.

nodes.name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Mild-Spice Plate
nodes.description: name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: A simple tuna pasta salad with cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and olive oil—protein-forward, veggie-rich, and mildly flavored for lunch or as
nodes.premise: Meal: Tuna Pasta Salad — Mild-Spice Plate - name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: A simple tuna pasta salad with cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and olive oil—protein-forward, veggie-rich, and mildly flavored for lunch or as a side. | meal_suggestion: This dish works as a light main or side. Serve about 1 cup cooked pasta with tuna and chopped cucumber and tomatoes, dressed with olive oil and a squeeze of lemon or herbs for mild flavor. For more fiber, swap to whole-grain pasta; add leafy greens on the side. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich tuna provides lean protein (~20–25 g per serving). Pasta supplies carbohydrates; olive oil adds heart-healthy fats. Cucumber and cherry tomatoes add fiber and micronutrients. Watch sodium from canned tuna; opt tuna in water and rinse, and consider whole-grain pasta for extra fiber.
